/CAL: BEHAVIOR COURT/X:DEFENDANT SELF-TERMINATED FROM BEHAVIOR HEALTH COURT, CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS  ARE REINSTATED/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP /CONTD:TO SETAPD MTR/DOP/CONTD SHORT FORM REPORT APD MTR/SUPP:12-20-18/CTORD:A SHORT FORM REPORT,/S22/
/CAL: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/X:DEFENDANT IS REMANDED FORTHWITH FOR NON-COMPLIANCE/  /SHER/NB/ /PROB ADM REV/CONTD BEHAVIOR COURT, DOP /CONTD:BEHAVIORCOURT REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:SENTENCE/CTW:85/X: CTS WAIVED FOR BHC ONLY,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 5 Y/4019HALF/REMA/ /X:SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE BEHAVIOR HEALTH COURT/WS/X:WARRANTLESS SEARCH INCLUDING ELECTRONIC DEVICES/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/WEAP/RESTV/PPRFCOMP/SAORD/SA2:BARNEY'S AT 77 O'FARRELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO; AND GREATER UNION SQUARE BID AREA, MAP ATTACHED TO SAO/X:HARVEY WAIVER OF RESTITUTION, ORDERS AND TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM 14032686 AND 13020347//X:IF DEFENDANT IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGES OR SAO VIOLATIONS; OR IS PLACEDIN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUTAUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION ANDREMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/DEF:ADHERENCE TO THE APD AND BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE, BASED UPON THE FACTS OF THIS CASE AND DEF'S HISTORY, ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSED PHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COURT, AS WELL AS MENTAL HEALTH AND OR DRUG TREATMENT /X:IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED INA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVESWITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM, NO REDUCTION OF THESECHARGES BY THE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COURT /X:IF DEFENDANT LEAVES OR IS TERMINATED  FROM BHC, THE PEOPLE WILL REQUEST REVOCATION OF PROBATION/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BERELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA:40/ICNA/PPRFCOMP/CTORD: FINES AND FEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINES AND FEES/CONTD:BEHAVIOR COURT/DOP/

/CAL: BEHAVIOR COURT DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 08-30-18/DISPO/X:ISS; PROB 5Y;/  /X:SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF BHC /X:WAIVEROF CREDITS UP TO SENTENCE FOR ALL TIMES AND PURPOSES PURSUANT TO PC2900,5//X: WS; VF $300; NO ALCOHOL; IND; RX; WEAP; RESTV;/X: DNACOMP; PC; PSR; PROBREVFN; COA $40; ICNA; BKFEE;/X:STAY OUT OF THE UNION SQUARE BUSINESS DISTRICT IN SF, MAP TO BE PROVIDED/X:HARVEY WAIVER OF RESTITUTION, ORDERS AND TERMS AND CONDITIONS FROM 14032686 AND 13020347/X:POSSESS NO BURGLARY TOOLS/X:NO NEW ARRESTS OR SAO VIOLATIONS, IF DEFENDANT IS ARRESTED ON NEW CHARGESOR SAO VIOLATIONS, DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND REMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN/X:IF DEF, IS PLACED INA RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM OR SUPPORTIVE HOUSING AND LEAVES WITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED,DEF, WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND REMANDEDINTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW PLACEMENT OR TREATMENT PLAN / /X:WARRANTLESS SEARCH INCLUDING ELECTRONIC DEVICES/DEF:ADHERENCE TO THE APD AND BHC INDIVIDUALIZED TREATMENT PLAN WHICH WILL INCLUDE, BASED UPON THE FACTS OF THIS CASE AND DEF'S HISTORY, ANY MEDICATION RECOMMENDED BY A LICENSED PHYSICIAN WORKING WITH THE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COURT, AS WELL AS MENTAL HEALTH AND OR DRUG TREATMENT /X:ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/ /X:IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAMAND LEAVESWITHOUT AUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHC PROGRAM,/ /X:THERE WILL BE NO REDUCTION OF THESE CHARGES AT ANY TIME BY THE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH COURT /X:IF DEFENDANT LEAVES BHC OR IS TERMINATED FROM BHC, THE PEOPLE WILL REQUEST REVOCATION OF PROBATION/
